headline: Yuan hits 90-day high as Beijing unleashes trade remedies and tightens private fund rules
headline_zh: 人民币创90日新高，中国密集出台贸易救济与私募新规
narrative: The yuan strengthened to a 90-day high against the dollar on June 13, even as the Ministry of Commerce announced anti-dumping duties on polyacetal imports from three Asian countries and tightened export controls on precursor chemicals. The currency move suggests persistent capital inflows or central bank guidance, diverging from expectations of depreciation amid China's slowing recovery. Meanwhile, the CSRC clarified new regulations for private investment funds, signaling continued deleveraging and risk control in the financial sector. Taken together, these actions underscore Beijing's dual focus on managing external trade frictions and domestic financial stability.
narrative_zh: 人民币兑美元升至90日新高，商务部同日宣布对韩国、泰国和马来西亚的共聚聚甲醛征收反倾销税，并收紧易制毒化学品出口管制。汇率走势显示资本持续流入或央行引导，与市场预期的贬值走势背离。同时，证监会就私募基金监管新规答记者问，表明金融去杠杆与风险防控仍在推进。上述举措凸显北京在外部贸易摩擦与内部金融稳定之间的双向发力。
market_snapshot: SSE Composite 4031.513 ▲0.54% · Shenzhen Component 14963.407 ▼2.00% · ChiNext 3830.353 ▲0.50% · USD/CNY 6.7621 ▼0.19% · USD/CNH 6.76 ▼0.04%
